text: {"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"4","subject":"Upgrade i18n infrastructure for full app","description":"Based on research from Task 1, upgrade ekoa/lib/i18n.ts to support the full app. Create translation files (ekoa/lib/i18n/en.ts and ekoa/lib/i18n/pt.ts) with all strings from the catalog (Task 2) plus strings from the reference app. Create a React hook (useTranslation or useT) and/or context provider so components can access translations reactively. Ensure locale changes trigger re-renders. Keep it lightweight -- no external i18n library unless the reference app used one.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-02T07:46:21.620Z"}
